info.name: 🎯 ALdeci — MISSION CONTROL
info.description:
## Mission Control — "What needs attention now?"

Covers: Command Dashboard, Executive View, SLA Dashboard, Live Feed, Risk Overview

### Personas Served
- **Sarah Chen** (CISO) — Morning briefing, risk posture
- **David Park** (VP Engineering) — Team velocity, SLA compliance
- **Michael Torres** (CTO) — Architecture risk, tech debt
- **Raj Patel** (DevSecOps Lead) — Triage queue, noise reduction
- **Janet Kim** (SOC Manager) — Live feed, incident response

### Endpoints: 80+ covering health, analytics, nerve center, streaming, users, teams, ML, logs

### Vision Pillar: V1 (APP_ID-Centric), V3 (Decision Intelligence), V10 (CTEM Full Loop)
